User.title: User Profile
User.description: Stores user points, watch time, and referral stats.

displayName.description: User's display name from Google Auth

verifiedWatchTime.description: Total verified watch time in minutes

claimedVideos.description: List of video IDs for which rewards have been claimed

Settings.title: Global Settings
Settings.description: Stores global app configuration like the current video drop.

youtubeVideoId.description: The ID of the current YouTube video

/users/{userId}.description: User profile document indexed by Firebase Auth UID.
